compiled_state.title: Sweep plugins/dso/docs/ and plugins/dso/agents/: flip thin-delegate descriptions and update absorbed script references
compiled_state.author: Worktree
compiled_state.description:
## Task

Update absorbed script name references in plugins/dso/docs/ and plugins/dso/agents/ files. This includes flipping the canonical vs. thin-delegate relationship in ticket-cli-reference.md, updating CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md internal script references, and updating completion-verifier.md.

## Mapping

- `sprint-next-batch.sh` → `ticket-next-batch.sh` (in CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md internal implementation context) or `ticket next-batch` (in prose/shim-call context)
- `sprint-list-epics.sh` → `ticket-list-epics.sh` (in CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md) or `ticket list-epics` (in shim-call context)

## Files to Modify

### plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md

**Line 1107** — currently: `Thin delegate to `sprint-list-epics.sh`. Output and flags are identical.`
Replace with: `Canonical implementation. `sprint-list-epics.sh` is the thin delegate.`

**Line 1191** — currently: `Thin delegate to `sprint-next-batch.sh`. Output and flags are identical.`
Replace with: `Canonical implementation. `sprint-next-batch.sh` is the thin delegate.`

### plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md (4 references — lines 75, 86, 97, 108)

All four lines reference `scripts/sprint-next-batch.sh` in the `Used by` column. After the f3ce-beaf refactor, the implementation lives in `scripts/ticket-next-batch.sh`. Update:
- `scripts/sprint-next-batch.sh` → `scripts/ticket-next-batch.sh`

The `# shim-exempt: internal implementation references in config documentation` annotation remains valid after the update (still referencing internal scripts).

### plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md

**Line 227**: `.claude/scripts/dso sprint-list-epics.sh --help 2>&1` → `.claude/scripts/dso ticket list-epics --help 2>&1`

**Line 241**: Prose reference `sprint-next-batch.sh pickup flow` → `ticket next-batch pickup flow`

## Structural Verification (run after all edits)

Run the following and confirm zero violations:
```bash
bash plugins/dso/scripts/check-shim-refs.sh 2>&1 | tail -5
bash plugins/dso/scripts/check-referential-integrity.sh 2>&1 | tail -5
bash plugins/dso/scripts/check-skill-refs.sh 2>&1 | tail -5
```

## Done Definition
- ticket-cli-reference.md lines 1107 and 1191 describe sprint-*.sh as the thin delegate
- CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md lines 75, 86, 97, 108 reference ticket-next-batch.sh (not sprint-next-batch.sh)
- completion-verifier.md references ticket list-epics and ticket next-batch
- check-shim-refs.sh, check-referential-integrity.sh, check-skill-refs.sh all pass with zero violations

## testing_mode: GREEN
Doc-only changes. Existing structural check scripts serve as verification.
